=== ./docker-compose.yml ===
version: '3.9'
services:
  db:
    build:
      context: ./mysql
    expose:
      - '3306'
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: root_password
      MYSQL_DATABASE: challenge
      MYSQL_USER: wordpress
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: wordpress
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - mysqladmin ping -h localhost -u wordpress -pwordpress
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
  wordpress:
    build:
      context: ./wordpress
    ports:
      - '9129:80'
    restart: on-failure
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - '-f'
        - http://localhost:80
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
=== ./Makefile ===
include ../../common.mk=== ./wordpress/Dockerfile ===
FROM wordpress:latest
COPY . /var/www/html
ARG FLAG
ENV FLAG=$FLAG
RUN echo "$FLAG" > /opt/flag.txt
